info.title: Navixy Backend API
info.description: OpenAPI specification for the Navixy Backend API. Covers all resources and endpoints from the Backend API (base path /v2). Authentication via session hash (API key). Rate limit: 50 req/s per user and per IP. Responses: success with value/list/result or error with status code and description.

post.description: Lists user's events (history) filtered by date range and optional event types. Documented in history-user.md.

get.description: Lists all existing user applications. Source: reference/user-applications.json

post.description: Creates a new application. Source: reference/user-applications.json
Updates an existing application. Source: reference/user-applications.json

post.summary: Deletes a user application by id
post.description: Deletes a specified application by its unique identifier. Source: reference/user-applications.json

post.summary: Toggles user application visibility in the side menu
post.description: Toggles application visibility in the side menu. Source: reference/user-applications.json

HashAuth.name: Authorization
HashAuth.description: Session hash. Use header: Authorization: NVX {hash}, or pass hash in request body.
